news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Delaware, Champion Safe Company, a top safe manufacturer and subsidiary of American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), participated in the first Buckeye Blast sporting clay fundraiser at Black Wing Shooting Center, Ohio. This event supported The Light Foundation, a nonprofit established by Ohio native and former New England Patriots offensive tackle Matt Light. The fundraiser aimed to raise awareness and funds for the organization's charitable activities. Champion Safe Company, known for its premium safes, demonstrated its commitment to community engagement and support for philanthropic causes. The event brought together participants to contribute to a noble cause and promote the spirit of giving back.
news.headline: Champion Safe Co. backs Buckeye Blast, a charity event for The Light Foundation by former NFL player Matt Light.

news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on May 16, 2025, a training program called Introduction to OASIS-E1 is being introduced online by Econometrica for home health agencies (HHAs) and their employees. The program is available at https://econometrica.learnworlds.com/. The curriculum was crafted by Econometrica's specialists who dedicated their efforts to its development.
news.headline: Econometrica offers new OASIS-E1 training course for home health agencies; online format, developed by experts.

news.summary: The recently unveiled lineup includes the new Predator Helios Neo 14 AI laptop and Predator Orion 3000 gaming desktop, both customizable with the cutting-edge NVIDIA GeForce RTX 50 Series graphics. The sleek Predator Triton 14 AI features an Intel Core Ultra 9 processor at 288V along with an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070, delivering top-notch performance for gaming enthusiasts.
news.headline: Acer introduces new gaming laptops, Predator Triton 14 AI and Helios Neo 14 AI, and gaming desktop Predator Orion 3000 with NVIDIA GeForce RTX 50 Series.
ICC prosecutor Khan on leave amid sexual misconduct probe -sources

news.summary: San Francisco - Williams-Sonoma, Inc. disclosed that it is set to unveil its first quarter performance numbers on Thursday, May 22nd, 2025 before the market commences trading hours. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WSM. The announcement detailed the schedule for a conference call scheduled for 10:00 AM Eastern Time on the same day, which stakeholders and interested individuals can join via the link http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events from 12:00 PM Eastern Time onwards.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. will release Q1 results on May 22, 2025, with a conference call at 10:00 AM Eastern Time.

news.summary: James A. “Jim” Radich, COO of Granite (NYSE:GVA), will retire on July 4, 2025. The company has decided not to appoint a successor for his role. Instead, directly reporting to Granite President and CEO Kyle Larkin will be the company’s Senior Vice Presidents of Construction - Brian R. Dowd, Michael G. Tatusko, and Bradley J. Williams, along with the Senior Vice President of Materials, Bradly J. Estes. Radich's retirement marks the end of his tenure as an Executive VP, bringing changes in Granite's leadership structure.
news.headline: Granite COO to retire on July 4, 2025. No successor named, Senior VPs and President/CEO will take over.

news.summary: BoomerangFX has introduced "AUVIA"™, an AI-driven virtual assistant designed to boost business operations. This innovative tool is equipped to generate leads, schedule consultations, and enhance patient retention through smart automation. The unveiling took place on May 16, 2025, across multiple global locations including Miami, Toronto, London, and Sydney. AUVIA aims to revolutionize processes by leveraging artificial intelligence technology to streamline tasks and improve overall performance.
news.headline: BoomerangFX unveils LeadEngineAI™, with AI virtual assistant "AUVIA" that boosts lead generation. A game-changer for private healthcare.

$SMCI - SUPER MICRO COMPUTER ANNOUNCES STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP WITH DATAVOLT  STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP WITH DATAVOLT FOR AI CAMPUSES INITIALLY IN KINGDOM OF SAUDI ARABIA  ESTIMATED MINIMUM MARKET VALUE OF PRODUCTS IS $20 BLN

news.summary: A new Eric Trump-themed memecoin, ERICTRUMP, launched on Solana's memecoin launchpad Pump.fun and surged over 6,200% in the past 24 hours, reaching a market capitalization of over $140 million in just one day. However, blockchain analysts have raised concerns about a potential rug pull due to suspicious distribution patterns. The majority of tokens are held by 10 main crypto addresses, resembling past memecoin collapses like the WOLF token. The same deployer behind the ERICTRUMP token had also launched three other failed Eric Trump tokens. Industry experts are wary of rug pulls following the collapse of the Libra token, which experienced a $4 billion market cap wipeout after insider wallets cashed out $107 million.
news.headline: New Eric Trump memecoin surged over 6,200% in 24 hours, reaching $140M market cap in a day, raising concerns of a possible rug pull. Rug pull dangers highlighted by Bubblemaps; similar to past collapses like WOLF token. Fake Eric Trump token deployer made 4 scam tokens.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, AB “Ignitis grupė” announced that its subsidiary, SP Venta SIA, has finalized a project financing deal worth EUR 77.5 million with Swedbank AS (Latvia) and “Swedbank” AB (Lithuania) for the construction of the Stelpe and Vārme solar farms. These solar farms will have a combined capacity of 239 MW.
news.headline: Ignitis Group secured EUR 77.5M financing from Swedbank for solar farms with 239 MW capacity.

news.summary: Introducing the latest Swift X laptops equipped with cutting-edge processors and NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 5070 Laptop GPUs paired with NVIDIA Studio Drivers, delivering enhanced AI capabilities for creators. The Swift X 14 and Swift X 14 AI models provide a seamless platform for editing and production tasks. Additionally, they come with innovative haptic technology for an improved user experience.
news.headline: Acer launches new Swift X laptops with NVIDIA GeForce RTX 50 Series GPUs for creators, promising powerful AI performance.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on Immersive Technology has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, revealing that the global market reached a value of $44.1 billion in 2024. The forecast indicates significant growth, with projections expecting the market to hit $184.3 billion by 2030. This represents a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 26.9% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, drivers, and future forecasts, equipping businesses with valuable insights to support decision-making processes.
news.headline: Global Immersive Technology market valued at US$44.1B in 2024 to reach US$184.3B by 2030, with 26.9% CAGR growth. Business Wire analysis.

news.summary: A report on the Custom SoC (ASIC) Market indicates promising growth prospects from 2025 to 2030. Valued at USD 27 billion in 2024, the market is forecasted to reach USD 43.39 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.23%. Key findings highlight the escalating demand for custom SoCs driven by the widespread adoption of IoT devices. Manufacturers are actively developing intricate solutions to meet the evolving market needs.
news.headline: Global Custom SoC (ASIC) Market valued at USD 27B in 2024, to reach USD 43.39B by 2030 with CAGR of 8.23%. Rising IoT adoption drives demand.

news.summary: In a noteworthy development, FXR Racing has signed Malcolm Stewart, a prominent figure in professional motocross and supercross, for the 2025 season. Stewart, who secured the 2016 250cc Supercross Championship and has also clinched victories in 450cc races, is widely recognized for his dynamic racing style and esteemed reputation. By welcoming Stewart to their roster, FXR Racing aims to showcase their state-of-the-art dirt bike gear as he competes in races moving forward. The collaboration will see Stewart sporting FXR's high-performance apparel on the track, embodying his distinctive flair and determination.
news.headline: Motocross champ Malcolm Stewart partners with FXR Racing, launches 27 Parallel Fishing Apparel Brand. #Motocross #FXR #27Parallel

news.summary: Origins, a skincare brand with more than three decades of experience in blending natural and scientifically formulated ingredients for potent skincare solutions, has launched in the U.S. Amazon Premium Beauty store. The renowned brand introduces its range of skincare and body care items alongside gift sets suitable for various events. By venturing into Amazon, Origins aims to provide its naturally derived, high-performing beauty products to customers across the nation, emphasizing convenience and curated gifting options.
news.headline: Origins debuts in Amazon's Premium Beauty Store in the U.S., offering iconic skincare, body care products, and giftable sets.

news.summary: Houston-based WM (NYSE: WM) has launched registration for its 2025 investor day event scheduled for June 24 at 8:30 a.m. EDT at New York Stock Exchange. The registration can be completed on the company’s Investor Day event website. The event is exclusive for the investment community, however, a live webcast will be accessible to all. Advanced registration is mandatory for attendance.
news.headline: WM (NYSE: WM) opens registration for its 2025 Investor Day on June 24 at NYSE, NYC, with live webcast. Visit: wminvestorday2025.q4ir.com.

news.summary: The successful performance of Zenvia Inc. in 2024 was driven by a significant increase in revenue from Communication Platform as a Service (CPaaS). The company effectively managed expenses, with General and Administrative (G&A) costs improving by 4 percentage points to 11.9% of total revenues. Looking ahead to 2025, Zenvia Inc. has revealed plans for a new strategic cycle. Based in São Paulo, on May 16, 2025, the company announced its position as the top cloud-based Customer Experience (CX) solution provider on the NASDAQ as ZENV.
news.headline: ZENVIA reports Q4 2024 results: G&A expenses down 4% to 11.9%, new strategic cycle announced for 2025.

news.summary: A report on the US Ammunition Market indicates that by 2028, it is projected to grow to USD 9.05 billion from its 2023 value of USD 7.96 billion, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate of 2.60%. The market analysis focuses on various applications including Defense (Military, Homeland Security), Civil & Commercial (Sporting, Hunting, Self Defense, Others), and categorizes ammunition by caliber into Small, Medium, and Large options. This data provides insights into the anticipated expansion and evolution of the US ammunition sector in the coming years.
news.headline: U.S. ammunition market to grow to $9.05B by 2028 from $7.96B in 2023, with a CAGR of 2.60% - report.

news.summary: Recently, three companies - Vine Coin, JellyJelly, and Dupe - have ventured into the world of Solana tokens to promote and finance their ventures. This move signifies a trend in which companies are turning to Solana tokens as a means to market their projects and raise funds.
news.headline: Market boom as companies launch products on Solana: Vine Coin, JellyJelly, and Dupe lead the way with new tokens.

news.summary: Security National Financial Corporation, ticker symbol SNFCA on NASDAQ, has released their financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, based in Salt Lake City, disclosed this information on May 16, 2025, through a press release.
news.headline: Security National Financial Corp. (SNFC) releases financial results for quarter ending March 31, 2025. Full details not provided.
Fitch Ratings: US tariffs are to affect issuers of two-thirds of European leveraged debt.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, DoiT, a prominent provider of enterprise cloud intelligence, has recently been awarded the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Small and Medium Business Competency. Leveraging their DoiT Cloud Intelligence™ technology, the company focuses on delivering beneficial results for businesses of various scales by emphasizing actionable strategies over excessive notifications. As a significant AWS partner, DoiT solidified its partnership with AWS in late 2023 through a substantial Strategic Collaboration Agreement, aiming to generate $5 billion in revenues.
news.headline: DoiT achieves AWS SMB Competency showing cloud intelligence success. Signed $5 billion deal with AWS in 2023.

news.summary: In Istanbul, The Coca-Cola Foundation (TCCF) and the Global Environment and Technology Foundation (GETF) announced the unveiling of 'Partnership for A Circular Tomorrow (PACT)', a joint initiative. TCCF contributed an initial grant of US $1 million to support this platform, focused on promoting sustainable practices to enhance waste management systems and reduce packaging waste. The project aims to drive advancements in waste recovery throughout the Eurasia and the Middle East Region. The first phase of PACT is set to be launched in 2025.
news.headline: The Coca-Cola Foundation and GETF launch PACT with $1 million grant to support recycling, reducing waste in Eurasia and Middle East.

news.summary: In South Korea's capital city, Seoul, Seoul Semiconductor is set to deploy its cutting-edge LED technology to enhance emergency visibility in tunnels and underpasses. The initiative aims to improve safety levels through specialized lighting solutions.
news.headline: Seoul Semiconductor and Seoul City partner to improve public safety with LED tech in tunnels and underpasses.

news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia, Women in Technology (WIT) revealed the recipients of the 26th Annual Leadership Awards. The prestigious awards were granted during WIT's yearly gala on May 15, 2025, at the Hyatt Regency located in Reston, VA. The event honored standout women in entrepreneurship, STEM, government, and corporate fields from the Washington, D.C. area tech community, marking another successful year for the organization.
news.headline: Winners of 26th Annual Leadership Awards by Women in Technology announced at gala in Reston, VA, celebrating women in tech.

news.summary: A statement has been issued to correct the release date of AB KN Energies' interim financial information for the first quarter of 2025. The updated date for this release is now scheduled for May 26, 2025. Investors and stakeholders can expect to receive key financial data and performance indicators for this period on that day. It is imperative for shareholders and analysts to mark their calendars for this important update on the company's financial status.
news.headline: AB KN Energies will release interim financial information for Q1 2025 on 26 May 2025, correcting previous dates.

news.summary: A design and construction contract was signed on May 16, 2025, by AS Merko Ehitus Eesti, a division of AS Merko Ehitus group, along with GRK Eesti AS, GRK Suomi Oy, NGE Contracting, Sweco Finland Oy, Sweco Sverige AB, and TSO SAS. This agreement was formed under an alliance procurement model with OÜ Rail Baltic Estonia.
news.headline: Contract signed in Estonia for Rail Baltica main line section between Tallinn and Pärnu by AS Merko Ehitus Eesti and other companies on May 16, 2025 with alliance procurement model with OÜ Rail Baltic Estonia.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Incannex Healthcare Inc. (Nasdaq: IXHL), a biopharmaceutical company based in New York and Melbourne, entered into agreements with holders of its Series A Warrants. These agreements, referred to as Letter Agreements, allow Incannex to potentially reduce around 50.4% of the common stock shares associated with its previously issued Series A Warrants. This move marks a significant step for the company, which specializes in developing oral combination medicines.
news.headline: Incannex may reduce up to 50.4% of Series A Warrants shares, as per agreements with holders.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on May 16, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO), a tech service provider, disclosed the creation of a new technology. This innovation involves a neural network-driven quantum-assisted unsupervised data clustering technology. It utilizes a hybrid algorithm framework that merges classical and quantum computing. By combining the classical self-organizing feature map (SOM) neural network with quantum computing, it allows for effective unsupervised data clustering. This technology showcases the Company's commitment to advanced solutions in the tech sector.Character count:  1063
news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. develops quantum-assisted data clustering technology combining neural networks and quantum computing.

news.summary: NEW YORK, May 16, 2025 - Medallion Bank revealed they have priced a public offering of 3,000,000 shares of its Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series G. The stocks, valued at $1.00 per share, have a liquidation amount of $25 per share, totaling $75 million. Medallion Bank, an FDIC-insured institution, specializes in providing consumer loans for recreational vehicles, boats, and home improvements, as well as loan origination services for fintech partners.
news.headline: Medallion Bank prices 3M shares of Series G Preferred Stock at $25 per share, totaling $75 million.

news.summary: BON has introduced a new series of patented postbiotic hypoglycemic ingredients and has also announced a collaboration agreement. They will be launching this innovative product line, leveraging their patented technology to address hypoglycemia. This marks a significant step for BON as they expand their product portfolio. The cooperation agreement signifies a strategic partnership that will enhance the distribution and reach of these products in the market. This announcement comes as BON continues to focus on innovation and growth.
news.headline: BON launches postbiotic hypoglycemic product series with patented ingredients, establishes cooperation agreement.

news.summary: Experienced leader Eric K. Brandt has joined the Nutanix Board as a new member, bringing with him a wealth of knowledge in finance and leadership. Brandt's appointment comes as David Humphrey steps down from the Nutanix Board. Brandt's vast experience in the field is expected to benefit the company as it navigates through its strategic decisions. Humphrey's resignation marks a change in the Board membership, with the transition aimed at strengthening the company's governance and direction. This development reflects Nutanix's commitment to ensuring strong leadership and expertise at the Board level.
news.headline: Nutanix appoints Eric K. Brandt to its Board, who brings financial expertise. David Humphrey resigns.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on May 16, 2025, Crown Electrokinetics Corp. (NASDAQ: CRKN) announced its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Crown Electrokinetics Corp. (NASDAQ: CRKN) reported first quarter results for 2025 on May 16th.

news.summary: Psychemedics has been recognized as the "Most Innovative Drug Testing Company of the Year" for their contributions to the field of drug testing. They were commended for their advancements in hair testing and the introduction of Enhanced Quartile Reporting. This prestigious award highlights Psychemedics' dedication to innovation and excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Psychemedics wins award for innovation in drug testing, recognized for hair testing and Enhanced Quartile Reporting.

news.summary: A recent study found that cases of COVID-19 in the United States have reached over 35 million, with more than 620,000 deaths reported. The study suggests that the increase in cases can be attributed to the highly contagious Delta variant. Hospitals across the country are reporting a surge in patients, overwhelming the healthcare system. Health officials are urging the public to get vaccinated and continue following safety protocols to help curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Onfolio Holdings Inc. reveals Q1 2025 financials and corporate update, showing significant growth.

news.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation and Abu Dhabi National Oil Company's XRG unit have entered an agreement to assess a potential joint venture aimed at developing a Direct Air Capture (DAC) hub in South Texas. This collaboration will focus on exploring the feasibility of establishing a facility that can capture approximately 500,000 metric tons of carbon dioxide annually from the atmosphere. The evaluation process will involve a detailed study to determine the technical and economic viability of the project. If successful, the DAC hub could play a significant role in reducing carbon emissions in the region.
news.headline: Occidental and ADNOC's XRG to assess joint venture for South Texas Direct Air Capture Hub.

news.summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has introduced the new BLU-U Model 4170E in Mumbai, India, Princeton, New Jersey, and Billerica, Massachusetts. The device offers a compact and user-friendly option while maintaining the same safety and effectiveness that healthcare professionals have relied on for years. This launch took place on May 16, 2025, as reported by PRNewswire.
news.headline: FDA approves Sun Pharma's BLU-U Model 4170E for actinic keratosis treatment, providing a compact and easy-to-use option.

news.summary: Summary: Acer has unveiled its latest Swift laptops equipped with Intel® Core™ Ultra 200V Series processors, complete with integrated AI acceleration for workloads. These laptops boast stunning OLED panels and feature an ultra-thin and lightweight magnesium-aluminum chassis. One of the standout models, the premium Acer Swift Edge 14 AI, is feather-light, weighing just...
news.headline: Acer launches new Copilot+ PCs: Swift Edge AI and Swift Go AI laptops powered by Intel Core Ultra 200V Series processors with OLED panels, featuring ultra-thin design.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Vancouver, BC, Damon Inc. (Nasdaq: DMN) announced its focus on revolutionizing the personal mobility sector by introducing innovative electric motorcycles and other mobility products. The company aims to empower this sector through data intelligence and strategic development, emphasizing a commitment to innovation and advancement.
news.headline: Damon Inc. (Nasdaq: DMN) plans to resume trading, Vancouver based electric motorcycle company focusing on innovation.

news.summary: Major development company PARQ Builders, LLC, revealed that their upscale apartment complex, 500 PARQ, located in the PARQ Life Reimagined Master-Planned Community in Parsippany, New Jersey, is close to reaching 95% stabilization. The property is being overseen by property management company Greystar.
news.headline: Luxury apartment community 500 PARQ in NJ close to full occupancy at 95%, managed by Greystar.

news.summary: Sally's Apizza has announced its inaugural professional sports partnership as the exclusive food sponsor for the Ferrari Challenge racing series. The agreement includes sponsorship of Ferrari of Miami race driver Dylan Medler. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for Sally's Apizza and highlights their shared passion for excellence. The partnership was officially unveiled in New Haven, Conn., on May 16, 2025. This strategic alliance underscores the alignment in values between Ferrari and Sally's Apizza, emphasizing their commitment to quality and performance in the racing world.
news.headline: Sally's Apizza sponsors Ferrari Challenge GT Racing Series, with Dylan Medler as the race driver.

news.summary: ProphetForce has recently become a member of the Epicor Partner Program, with a key emphasis on aiding distributors in updating and revolutionizing their operations through the cutting-edge Epicor Prophet 21 Cloud ERP. The announcement was made in Wilmington, N.C., on May 16, 2025. ProphetForce is dedicated to supporting customers within the distribution industry to enhance their processes and drive efficiency. This partnership aims to provide distributors with the necessary tools and resources to modernize their operations.
news.headline: ProphetForce, a 910 Advisors Brand, joins Epicor Partner Program to assist distributors with Epicor Prophet 21 Cloud ERP.

news.summary: Recent data indicates the importance of personalized, mobile-centered education in keeping the interest and commitment of the latest cohort of frontline employees. According to findings from Waterloo as of May 16, 2025, Generation Z (Gen Z) is transforming the labor force and establishing fresh standards for the effectiveness of training.
news.headline: Axonify reveals training challenges for Gen Z workers; personalized, mobile-first learning crucial for retention.

news.summary: Embrace the art of overpacking with the newly introduced 29-inch Bounce Check-In Trunk Suitcase by CASETiFY. The leading brand in travel accessories has unveiled this latest addition to its CASETiFY Travel collection. This spacious suitcase offers ample room for all your travel essentials while ensuring style and durability. For more visual details, visit the provided link. On May 16, 2025, in Los Angeles, CASETiFY announced the exciting release of this oversized suitcase, catering to individuals who love to pack generously.
news.headline: CASETiFY introduces new 29" Bounce Check-In Trunk Suitcase for overpackers; part of Travel collection expansion, as of May 16, 2025.

news.summary: AbelZeta Pharma, Inc., based in Rockville, Maryland, revealed on May 16, 2025, that they have been acknowledged for their pioneering work in developing cell-based therapeutic products. This global clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company is dedicated to discovering and advancing innovative treatments. The specifics of the recent acceptance were not provided.
news.headline: AbelZeta to present at LUPUS 2025 conference. Company developing cell-based therapies.

news.summary: Roundhouse Provisions Morning Kick, developed by Chuck Norris, is boosting healthy digestion, energy levels, and overall wellness. The product has garnered more than 2,500 positive reviews from various sources.
news.headline: Chuck Norris' Morning Kick drink by Roundhouse Provisions gets 2,500+ positive reviews, boosts health and energy.
